mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOOKMARK (BOOKMARK_ID, USER_ID, POSTING_ID, BOOKMARKED_AT) VALUES (SEQ_BOOKMARK.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{postingId}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT POSTING_ID FROM BOOKMARK WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY BOOKMARKED_AT DESC

SELECT jp.POSTING_ID, jp.COMPANY_NAME, TO_CHAR(jp.POSTED_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS POSTED_DATE, TO_CHAR(jp.DEADLINE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DEADLINE, jp.REGION, jp.EMPLOYMENT_TYPE, jp.EDUCATION, jp.JOB_POSITION, jp.TECH_STACK, jp.SALARY, jp.POSTING_URL FROM BOOKMARK b JOIN JOB_POSTING jp ON b.POSTING_ID = jp.POSTING_ID WHERE b.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY b.BOOKMARKED_AT DESC
